description: The PositionAtUser component drives the values in ``PositionDrive`` and ``RotationDrive`` to match the user's position and rotation as determined by the settings in ``PositionSource`` and ``RotationSource`` respectively.

fields.TargetUser: The user that will be used to calculate the parent slot position, unless ``PositionAtLocalUser`` is selected.
fields.PositionAtLocalUser: Position the parent slot at the Local User of each client, ignoring the value in ``TargetUser``
fields.TargetPositionOffset: Position offset in the user's local space units. Respects the user's current scale and transforms.
fields.TargetRotationOffset: Rotation offset in the user's local space unit. Respects the user's current scale and transforms.
fields.PositionOffset: Position offset in global space units
fields.RotationOffset: Rotation offset in global space units
fields.PositionSource: The user node that the position will be calculated from
fields.RotationSource: The user node that the rotation will be calculated from
fields.PositionDrive: Target Float3 to drive with the calculated position value
fields.RotationDrive: Target FloatQ to drive with the calculated rotation value.
